text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh? Have you started an Umastagram?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...I was just looking. There are a lot of<n>good
photos of the starry sky on there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The stars, huh. You take photos of the<n>night sky
too, don't you? Aren't you<n>gonna post them?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd rather not. That's not really my thing.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, true. You seem like the type to keep<n>your
favorite things to yourself... ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then don't hold back—share your pics<n>with us!
Umasta is fun, you know! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, for tags you could use...<n>#Ayabe,
#SparklyMeteorShower,<n>#OnceInALifetime, and<n>
#StargazingGoals.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Stargazing... goals? ...No, you know<n>what, I'm
really okay with just looking.
